greedycraft.scoreboard.packmode.name: Mode
greedycraft.scoreboard.author: §a§lReMake: §d§lGCTN Team
greedycraft.modpack.name: §bGreedyCraft§7·§c§lNIRVANA
greedycraft.commands.error.permissions: §cYou do not have permission to execute this command!
greedycraft.tips.text.1: Supremium is a very good material for Tinker's Construct weapons! It's not hard to get if you have ways to grow crops quickly.
greedycraft.tips.text.2: You can throw all ores you get into your tinker's smeltery and see if they form new alloys.
greedycraft.tips.text.3: Press ~ button to mine ores or chop trees quickly! But it also consumes tool durability and hunger fast. Also, you might not be able to do this at the beginning.
greedycraft.tips.text.4: To throw an item, press the / button on your numpad.
greedycraft.tips.text.5: Consider adding a part made with Ardite to your pickaxe, it makes your pickaxe much more durable in practice!
greedycraft.tips.text.6: Use tinker's smeltery to make alloys. It's possible to cast liquids into blocks if you use a basin, which makes converting liquids into ingots much quicker.
greedycraft.tips.text.7: Build your smeltery as big as you can.
greedycraft.tips.text.8: You will no longer worry about getting full inventory when you max out a /dank/null!
greedycraft.tips.text.9: It's said that you can put a backpack into another mod's backpack, and another mod's backpack into another mod's backpack...
greedycraft.tips.text.10: If you are too lazy to build a house, look for villages or search for @Prefab to build one instantly!
greedycraft.tips.text.11: Remember to place a waystone next to the end portal you found, it's very useful.
greedycraft.tips.text.12: If you can't find endermen, you can farm ender pearls with a tiny mob farm!
greedycraft.tips.text.13: A Warp Scroll can teleport you to any waystone at anywhere, but is consumed when used! You can use a warp stone instead, it does not consume but has a cooldown!
greedycraft.tips.text.14: In adventure and casual modes, you don't lose items when dead but loses 75% of your XP!
greedycraft.tips.text.15: Use directional keys to adjust the 3rd person camera.
greedycraft.tips.text.16: You can throw useless tools found in the dungeon into the smeltery!
greedycraft.tips.text.17: If you can't find Blizz, you can pulverize permafrost stones found underground!
greedycraft.tips.text.18: Wires from different mods can usually be interconnected!
greedycraft.tips.text.19: 1st person mode is more used when building or bridging.
greedycraft.tips.text.20: Eat different kinds of food to increase your max health! A multiblock kitchen might make that more easy.
greedycraft.tips.text.21: Building your base in a defiled land is a bad idea.
greedycraft.tips.text.22: Some ores are too rare? Grow them!
greedycraft.tips.text.23: It might be a good idea to keep a cow at home if you want constant milk supply. Also try to squash a cow into a milk jar with an falling anvil!
greedycraft.tips.text.24: Make a grappling hook to explore the world with style!
greedycraft.tips.text.25: Make a XP block to store your XP and never afraid about losing them again!
greedycraft.tips.text.26: Some tinker trait effects are actually negative, but sometimes it's necessary for mining better ores.
greedycraft.tips.text.27: You can craft leather with 4 rotten flesh!
greedycraft.tips.text.28: Lava's heat is not enough to smelt some ores, you need to seek for hotter liquids.
greedycraft.tips.text.29: Vanilla food are nerfed, you should cook better food with a kitchen!
greedycraft.tips.text.30: Don't worry about trampling your farm, farms can't be trampled now!
greedycraft.tips.text.31: Open loot bags quickly with a loot opener!
greedycraft.tips.text.32: Can't find a stuff? Hover over the desired item in JEI and press Y, if it's found in nearby chests you can see a smoke particle!
greedycraft.tips.text.33: Can't find an End City? You can craft an elytra! But it's expensive.
greedycraft.tips.text.34: If you consecutively eat a kind of food it will restore decreasingly lower hunger. Seek for a more variated diet.
greedycraft.tips.text.35: Mobs will occasionally turn into champions and gain a lot of stat boosts, be aware!
greedycraft.tips.text.36: Villagers now look like players and if they are happy you can marry with them?? You probably need a wedding ring.
greedycraft.tips.text.37: A Waystone can be found in every village, don't forget to activate them!
greedycraft.tips.text.38: You will occasionally see battle towers, with a powerful boss guarding the treasure. Be aware!
greedycraft.tips.text.39: You can convert elytra into a bauble to free up your body armor slot!
greedycraft.tips.text.40: View more advanced JEI search methods in JEI settings.
greedycraft.tips.text.41: If you feel laggy, try to use /purge to clear all ground items.
greedycraft.tips.text.42: Ever been to the Lost City dimension yet? For how to build the portal, see the modpack guide book.
greedycraft.tips.text.43: This tip doesn't hint anything, weird!
greedycraft.tips.text.44: Begin your journey to the Aether by building a glowstone frame and pouring water into it!
greedycraft.tips.text.45: The more Ender Dragons and Withers you fight, the stronger they become! But stronger enemies come with greater rewards, too.
greedycraft.tips.text.46: Try fishing! You can fish up many new treasures.
greedycraft.tips.text.47: Difficulty of mobs will increase as you progress!
greedycraft.tips.text.48: Damage calculation of armor points are different from vanilla. Now even leather armors are way better than being naked.
greedycraft.tips.text.49: As the difficulty increase, loot become better too!
greedycraft.tips.text.50: You can open quest menu in your inventory screen, it tells you what to do if you have no clue!
greedycraft.tips.text.51: Difficulty will increase when you defeat vanilla bosses for the first time.
greedycraft.tips.text.52: The lower your hunger is, the slower it gets consumed.
greedycraft.tips.text.53: There are many ways to increase your max health. You can try eating different kinds of food or crafting heart containers.
greedycraft.tips.text.54: Bosses gain less proportion of their health than normal mobs as difficulty increases, and some bosses have a fixed amount of health.
greedycraft.tips.text.55: Search with a @ followed by mod id to search all items registered by that mod.
greedycraft.tips.text.56: Craft two sand blocks into a Snad. It accelerates grow speed of sugarcanes and cactuses.
greedycraft.tips.text.57: You can build a 3*3*3 cube of chance cubes to make it turn into a mega chance cube. BEWARE: GIANT EXPLOSION CAN OCCUR.
greedycraft.tips.text.58: You might get a lot of enchanted items from loot or battle, use them to generate power! There's a dynamo specialization upgrade that can do this.
greedycraft.tips.text.59: Large ore deposits can be rarely found underground, if you find one you will get rich! Notice strange flower circles on the surface.
greedycraft.tips.text.60: Grappling hook can help a lot in the End. Get one before you go there!
greedycraft.tips.text.61: If you have lost the Omnipedia, you can craft one witn an Akashic Tome.
greedycraft.tips.text.62: Dragon metals are among the best tinker's materials and they can gain additional stats by upgrading via fusion crafting!
greedycraft.tips.text.63: Hover over an item and press Shift+del to delete all same kind of items in your inventory!
greedycraft.tips.text.64: If your save file fails to load or you messed up something really bad, restore the latest backup.
greedycraft.tips.text.65: You can craft solar panels for clean and efficient energy.
greedycraft.tips.text.66: Beware of champion mobs! They are very strong and some might pull you with The Force! They also drop some good loot.
greedycraft.tips.text.67: Chances for champion mobs to spawn depends on your difficulty!
greedycraft.tips.text.68: You are more likely to stumble upon large dungeons when far away from the spawn point!
greedycraft.tips.text.69: Right click a pure daisy to directly place blocks around it!
greedycraft.tips.text.70: Not enough building blocks? Use a chisel!
greedycraft.tips.text.71: It might be a good idea to build your base between two biomes because you can easily keep bees that require different biomes.
greedycraft.tips.text.72: §bI just added this tip to see if I can use colored text in tips.
greedycraft.tips.text.73: Infinity block block block can be used as beacon base!
greedycraft.tips.text.74: Search @ftbquests in JEI to look for some items that might help you complete quests!
greedycraft.tips.text.75: Want to sleep at day? build a hammock!
greedycraft.tips.text.76: Shift-click the '+' button in JEI recipe menu to move all items in your inventory to the crafting table.
greedycraft.tips.text.77: You might find tinker's artifacts in dungeons, they can't be modified until you unseal it with a §6Plate of Unsealing§r.
greedycraft.tips.text.78: You can only unlock the final reward by collecting enough medals.
greedycraft.tips.text.79: There is an ultimate quest which requires all other quests to be done. What is the reward? Don't ask me, I'm just a tip.
greedycraft.tips.text.80: Some tinker's materials have deep integration with the mods they come from.
greedycraft.tips.text.81: You haven't got Infinity Block Block Block Block Block Block Block Block Block yet?
greedycraft.tips.text.82: Sometimes quests reward creative shards, which can be further made into some creative mode items, with a bunch of other expensive stuff.
greedycraft.tips.text.83: You can insert §acolor codes§r anywhere to color your texts!
greedycraft.tips.text.84: When you have too many levels of jump boost, jump higher by holding the jump key.
greedycraft.tips.text.85: Mobs sometimes drop loot crate tickets, note that some levels of tickets can only be dropped at a higher difficulty.
greedycraft.tips.text.86: Inventory pets are your good companions, they provide a set of bonus and skills!
greedycraft.tips.text.87: Wires from XNet are better in performance because they aren't tile entities.
greedycraft.tips.text.88: You can start or stop a blood moon with Blood Sigil and Blood Sacrifice.
greedycraft.tips.text.89: You can set spawnpoint at day by clicking a bed.
greedycraft.tips.text.90: When you sleep, if you don't click on 'Set Spawn', spawn point will not be set!
greedycraft.tips.text.91: Not enough ores to use? You can use Mekanism to QUINTUPLE your ores!
greedycraft.tips.text.92: You die when you are killed.
greedycraft.tips.text.93: A boat might be helpful underground to get across the underground lakes.
greedycraft.tips.text.94: Wear your headsets for best game experience.
greedycraft.tips.text.95: Vanilla diamond pickaxe can't mine obsidian and vanilla weapons are nerfed. Please set up your tinker's workshop as soon as possible.
greedycraft.tips.text.97: You can craft dragon breath using a glass bottle and a dragon egg! Dragon egg doesn't get consumed.
greedycraft.tips.text.98: Most ground decorations can be picked up by right clicking! Shift-right-click to pick up its block form.
greedycraft.tips.text.99: Your world will be blessed with new ores when defeating the Ender Dragon!
greedycraft.tips.text.100: Osram can only be found floating on lava oceans in the Nether. Lava Wader and obsidian boat may help you!
greedycraft.tips.text.101: Accessories can have prefixes, which can be changed by reforging. Craft a reforge station to do so.
greedycraft.tips.text.102: Use /purge command to clear dropped items when you experience lag while exploring.
greedycraft.tips.text.103: Mob spawners have a spawn limit and disables itself after spawning a set number of mobs.
greedycraft.tips.text.104: Most rewards of the battle tower require you to defeat its guardian and get the key.
greedycraft.tips.text.105: If you want some challenge, try Expert mode!
greedycraft.tips.text.106: When summoning the Wither, make sure there are no blocks near the structure. Some blocks might make your summon attempt fail.
greedycraft.tips.text.107: Note: Most mobs don't break blocks, but some bosses will, and all vanilla bosses can destroy blocks! Just don't summon a Wither at home.
greedycraft.tips.text.108: The Shady Merchant gives some tempting deals... but are they genuine?
greedycraft.tips.text.109: You can crush most of dungeon loot into time shards, which can be used to summon even more loot.
greedycraft.tips.text.110: Most tools and armors that don't belong to tinker's construct have been disabled. Try to find out the best combo of tinker's materials.
greedycraft.tips.text.111: You can make tinker's tools basically out of everything... Many more materials are added TiC integration in this modpack.
greedycraft.tips.text.112: Cosmilite is an extremely strong material, but also almost every other strong alloys combined.
greedycraft.tips.text.113: Some mobs only appear in hardmode!
greedycraft.tips.text.114: Mob spawners disable themselves after producing a set amount of mobs!
greedycraft.tips.text.115: Use /syncdifficulty command if your difficulty goes wrong.
greedycraft.tips.text.116: If you are bothered by warp, try to craft a §dPurifying Pill§r. It clears all warp on you.
greedycraft.tips.text.117: If your magnet on you keeps sucking items when you need them for crafting, try to craft a demagnetizer which disables this effect.
greedycraft.tips.text.118: You can simply jump over the fences, but mobs can't!
greedycraft.tips.text.119: If you find a lot of mud underground, you can find Cytosinite nearby.
greedycraft.tips.text.120: Do not care too much about enchanting. Tinker's tools don't need enchantments.
greedycraft.tips.text.121: Mystical crops grown in the typical way don't drop seeds. Use a organic infuser to grow crops!
greedycraft.tips.text.122: You can pass leaves, but leaves also slow you down.
greedycraft.tips.text.123: The chance for a meteor to spawn increases after you go to the nether once. The chance also increases greatly in a star shower.
greedycraft.tips.text.124: If you stay at a place for a long time, the chance for a meteor to spawn will get halved, if you stay for longer, it gets halved again.
greedycraft.tips.text.125: Occasionally at night, a star will fall from the sky, go after it and you can pick up a fallen star.
greedycraft.tips.text.126: You are 1.5 blocks tall when sneaking, which is just enough to pass a 3-slabs-tall hole.
greedycraft.tips.text.127: You can throw ingots or ores to the ground to instantly unify them according to their ore dictionary.
greedycraft.tips.text.128: When advanced tooltip (F3+H) is enabled, the ore dictionaris of an item will be listed in the tooltip with gold color.
greedycraft.tips.text.129: When getting hit by a spider you might gain increasingly high level of slowness. If you are already slow enough it can trap you with a cobweb!
greedycraft.tips.text.130: It's possible to find a giant tinker's smeltery in a village!
greedycraft.tips.text.131: Ever been to the depths of the ocean? That's where the Aqualite can be found.
greedycraft.tips.text.133: When you fall into the void you will be sent into the Nether!
greedycraft.tips.text.134: Warning: don't play with thaumcraft at home. You have been warned.
greedycraft.tips.text.135: Got a bunch of dungeon loot but don't find them useful? Just crush them to time shards!
greedycraft.tips.text.136: Got a bunch of dungeon loot? You can generate power with them!
greedycraft.tips.text.137: Tip: don't play this game with a default skin.
greedycraft.tips.text.138: Use sharpening kits and polishing kits to repair your tools and armors.
greedycraft.tips.text.140: You can find urns that contain treasures! Beware of snakes!
greedycraft.tips.text.141: Aim for the mob's head when shooting. Headshots deal more damage!
greedycraft.tips.text.142: If the background music stops playing for too long, press alt + minus on numpad to reload Ambient mod.
greedycraft.tips.text.143: You can put all kinds of strange rocks into a Solid Centrifuge and see what you get!
§bA gem that gives out a mystical glow.
§6Used to activate the Twilight Forest portal.
greedycraft.item.creative_soul.tooltip.1: §5Only a little bit of the infinite power of creativity.
greedycraft.item.creative_soul.tooltip.2: §5You can already feel the pulse inside it.
greedycraft.item.ender_charm.tooltip.1.t: §3Only those who has once fell into the Otherside shall enter the End.
deeperdarker.item.heart_of_the_deep.tool: §eRight-click on §lReinforced Deepslate§e to enter the §9§l§nAbyssal§e dimension
§bRight click to summon a meteor on top of you
§cDo not use this at your base
greedycraft.item.medkit_big.tooltip.1.te: §7Increases max health by 20 which lasts for 40s.
greedycraft.item.blood_sigil.tooltip.2.t: §eBloodmoon will occur at the next possible night
greedycraft.item.bloody_sacrifice.toolti: §eSkip a blood moon to the next morning.
greedycraft.item.forbidden_bible.tooltip: §4Demonic whispers are written all over it.
§4You might summon an evil presence by using this book on a summoning altar.
greedycraft.item.true_blood_sigil.toolti: §eRight click to summon a blood moon
§eLeft click to skip a blood moon
§e§oNo hero is born to be a hero.
§7Increases max health by 80 which lasts for 60s.
greedycraft.item.wither_soul.tooltip.1.t: §5§oThe soul of the most mighty Wither.
§5§oAll heroes are born to be ordinary.
greedycraft.item.solarium_star.tooltip.2: §6A new ore will spawn in the Nether
greedycraft.item.sun_totem.tooltip.1.tex: §eShift-right-click a §cSummoning Altar§e to summon §6Barako, the Sun Chief
greedycraft.item.solar_seed.tooltip.1.te: §eCombine with a broken solarium star to activate its real power.
greedycraft.item.broken_solarium_star.to: §eLooks like it's broken. Fix it with a §6Solar Seed§e!
greedycraft.item.difficulty_changer.tool: §eLeft click to lower difficulty and right click to raise difficulty.
greedycraft.item.creative_controller.too: §bRight click to switch to creative mode and left click to switch back.
greedycraft.item.ocd_certificate.tooltip: §bNow you are a qualified OCD patient now.
§aWhat? You are expecting some bigger reward?
§dYou have done everything and there must be some more important things to do.
§6Now take a break. You have already wasted too much time.
greedycraft.item.arcane_crystal_ball.too: §5You only made this to prove your magical skills.
greedycraft.item.ancient_tome_fragment.t: §7A tiny fragment from an ancient artifact.
§7The words on it can barely be seen.
§eDropped from mobs at high difficulties, the higher difficulty the more likely it will be dropped.
greedycraft.item.ancient_tome_page.toolt: §7It's partly repaired, but still not understandable.
§eYou have finally restored the artifact of the ancients.
§eIt's all written in a strange language you don't understand.
§eBut you still think this is gonna be very useful.
greedycraft.item.bag_of_dyes.tooltip.1.t: §eLooks like it's filled with dyes... open it and have a look?
greedycraft.item.bounty_hunter_medal_eme: §eRight click to turn nearby villagers into Bounty Merchants.
§7Has a chance to be rewarded by bounties.
greedycraft.item.bravery_certificate.too: §e§oOnly the bravest ones shall have it.
greedycraft.item.city_defender_medal.too: §7Some words are scribbled on it, you can barely read them:
§7§oThank you... for what you did to protect this city.
greedycraft.item.cryonic_artifact.toolti: §3It is cold enough to freeze the sun.
§3Right click to consume and nerf all nearby Sun Spirits to 1HP.
greedycraft.item.death_coin.tooltip.1.te: §bRight click to make a contract with the devil and enter §cSuper Hardmode§b, gaining max difficulty.
greedycraft.item.death_coin.tooltip.2.te: §bLeft click air to get out of §cSuper Hardmode§b
greedycraft.item.death_counter.tooltip.1: §7§oRight click to show the death leaderboard.
§bWarps a load of goods to you with future technology!
greedycraft.item.difficulty_syncer.toolt: §dWhen used, set your difficulty to the supposed difficulty at your game stage.
§7§m/syncdifficulty does this too but this is for people who can't remember commands.
greedycraft.item.emergency_button.toolti: §4THIS SHOULD ONLY BE USED FOR EMERGENCY, DO NOT USE WHEN NOTHING GOES WRONG
§cRight click to clear §6all entities§c besides players in the server.
§cLeft click to clear all §6hostile entities§c in the server.
§cCleared entities drop nothing and don't count as player kills.
§cAlso clears all potion effects on the user.
§cONLY USE THIS WHEN YOU HAVE TO.
§bTo get this, you need to wait for the countdown in the 'Emergency Item' in FTBQuests menu.
greedycraft.item.executor_terminal.toolt: §4§oIt's up to you to decide the fate of this world.
§c§oRight click to terminate the Elysian Project and the current simulation.
§ePut this at the middle column of the crafting table,
§eThe tool that receives EXP on its left, the tool that gives EXP on its right,
§eThen it will transport levels from the tool on the right to the tool on the left.
§6Both tools must be at full durability, and also applies to armors.
§6You might need to add a modifier to the new tool to refresh its modifier slot count.
§cNote: The tool on the right will vanish after crafting.
greedycraft.item.experiment_note.tooltip: §7A broken experiment log, the text on it can't be seen clearly.
§6This is fake, but can still be used to turn sand into glass without any cost...
§a100% Natural, just too easy to break.
greedycraft.item.guide_book.tooltip.1.te: §6There's only one line of text on it:
greedycraft.item.item_purger.tooltip.1.t: §bRight click to clear all ground items.
§2§oIn real life it has a 1/5000 chance to be found in clovers.
§7Can be obtained by punching tall grass. (Low chance!)
greedycraft.item.one_punch.tooltip.1.tex: §c§oHuman beings are strong because we can change ourselves.
greedycraft.item.passport.tooltip.1.text: §6Right click to unlock all game stages
greedycraft.item.passport.tooltip.2.text: §6Left click to lock all game stages
§eCombine with tools or armors with tool forge / armor forge
§eto apply a modifier that increases damage or defense as the tool levels up.
§bMax level is 3 on tools and 1 on armor.
§2When used, converts nearby blocks like a pure daisy.
§eRight click to set current location as spawn point.
greedycraft.item.reward_ticket_common.to: §7Put into crafting table or right click to get a §aCOMMON§r§7 Loot Crate
greedycraft.item.reward_ticket_epic.tool: §7Put into crafting table or right click to get a §dEPIC§r§7 Loot Crate
greedycraft.item.reward_ticket_legendary: §7Put into crafting table or right click to get a §6LEGENDARY§r§7 Loot Crate
greedycraft.item.reward_ticket_rare.tool: §7Put into crafting table or right click to get a §9RARE§r§7 Loot Crate
§bThese sand flows upwards when in a hourglass.
greedycraft.item.shield_gum.tooltip.2.te: §6But chewing it takes a long time...
greedycraft.item.strange_lolipop.tooltip: §eBut grants a huge boost to damage.
§2The most dangerous substance in the universe and is stored in a magnetic field constraint device.
§7Can only be used to exchange for EMC
greedycraft.item.sunny_doll.tooltip.2.te: §eSets the weather to sunny when used.
greedycraft.item.time_fragment.tooltip.1: §bSeems to be a piece of debris from another dimension.
greedycraft.item.tower_chest_key.tooltip: §eUnlock Tower Chests by putting them in crafting table!
greedycraft.item.tower_chest.tooltip.1.t: §eSeems like it needs a key to open.
greedycraft.advancement.description.init: Are you ready to begin? (Create a world in Survival Mode)
Creativity knows no bounds. (Create a world in Creative Mode)
greedycraft.message.playerlogging.system: §a Now Showing the Latest Unread Announcement.
§e Player Count is Drastically Decreasing in the Virtual Network and Some has Turned Into Hostile Entities.
§e The Reality is Probably Under Attack.
§e Illusion Defense System is Failed and Plenty of Hostile Entities has Been Detected in the Public Interface.
§e If You Can See This Announcement, Please Try to Escape the Elysian Simulation, Which is the Only way to Figure out What Happened.
§e ONLY YOU CAN SAVE HUMANITY FROM THE WRONG PATH!
greedycraft.message.creative.text: §eSince this world was created in §d§n§lCreative Mode§e, all stages have been unlocked. Create freely!
greedycraft.message.cheat.text: §c§lGCTN Anti-Cheat System: Cheating activity has been detected. We do not recommend that you continue, but this is your world and we will not stop you. However, if you can complete this modpack through your own effort, wouldn’t that be a truly rewarding achievement? If you believe that something in the modpack has affected your desire or ability to play normally, please contact us!
greedycraft.message.cheat.modlist.text: §c§lGCTN Anti-Cheat System: Illegal modules have been detected. We strongly recommend that you immediately remove any mods you added yourself. Regardless of the reason, adding third-party mods without authorization will not receive any support from the GCTN team. Of course, if you believe the mods you added can improve the modpack, please contact us! Module Name:
greedycraft.message.anticheat.text: §c§lGCTN Anti-Cheat System: Please do not do this! Prohibited command:
greedycraft.message.stage.unlock.title: §b§lGame Stage Unlocked!
greedycraft.message.stage.unlock.message: §b§lThe following items or features are now unlocked:
greedycraft.message.showscoreboard.null: §cNo scoreboard currently exists. Please use /greedycraft showscoreboard true to enable the scoreboard first.
greedycraft.commands.setpackmode.casual: §c§lYou cannot switch to Casual Mode while in-game. Doing so may cause unknown consequences. If you want to experience Casual Mode, please close the game, go to 'config/greedycraft/config.json' to change the game mode, and then create a new save.
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.1: §eExperiencing lag? When memory usage is high, use the §6Free Memory§e button in the §6R§e key menu to manually clear memory!
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.2: §eThanks for playing GreedyCraft! If you encounter any issues, please refer to the §6'GreedyCraft – From Beginner to Master'§e guide first.
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.3: §eIf you encounter mod-related issues, please check the §6Encyclopedia§e! Guides for all mods can be found there.
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.4: §eThis modpack includes a vast amount of music and improved sound effects. Strongly recommend playing with headphones!
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.5: §eYou can switch game modes in the Quest Menu! The Quest Menu can be found in the top-left corner of your inventory screen.
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.6: §eYou can adjust the game mode before entering the game! The game mode configuration file is located at config/greedycraft/config.json. Changing the value after packmode will change the game mode!
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.7: §eYou can use the /greedycraft command to switch the modpack mode and to show or hide the scoreboard.
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.8: §eIf you experience background music stopping for long periods, you can press §6Alt + Numpad -§e to reload the dynamic music!
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.9: §eIf you experience lag, try pressing §6R§e to open the menu and click the '§6Free Memory§e' button. Alternatively, try adjusting your render distance down and then back up.
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.10: §eYou can use §6/hidedeathquotes§e to disable death message displays, or §6/showdeathquotes§e to re-enable them!
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.11: §eYou can use §6/backup§e to manually back up your world. You can find the option to restore backups on the world selection screen!
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.12: §ePress §6B§e to create a new waypoint at your location. Press §6B§e on the map screen to create one at the cursor position!
greedycraft.message.loggingtips.13: §eWhen updating the modpack version, move the §6saves§e folder from the old installation's root directory to the same location in the new version to preserve your worlds!
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.init.lo: §a§o§nStart experiencing the game from now on!
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.init.un: §d§lYou can view the game stage tree on the 'Progress' page.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.twiligh: §9§o§nYou can now stand the heat in the Nether.
§6§o§nWelcome to hell! Challenges and treasures await.
§d§lMobs now wear stronger armors and hold stronger weapons
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.gaia_ki: §e§o§nI think you're ready to take the next step
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.wither_: §5§o§nThe evil soul has been defeated and the world has finally been freed from the destiny of withering...
§c§o§n§lA mighty presence in the End is watching you.
§a§lItems that uses Nether Star as ingredient
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.fearles: §6§o§nYou have proved yourself in the battle with Valkyrie. Now you can go to the Otherside.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.ender_c: §c§o§n§lBe prepared, you are going to begin a journey that has no return.
§c§o§n§lBe prepared because difficulty will greatly increase after defeating Ender Dragon
§5§lYou can now challenge the Ender Dragon
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.hardmod: §5§o§nThe cursed soul within the dragon has been unleashed.
§5§o§nIn that battle, the dragon didn't use its full power because it knows that it will be freed.
§5§o§n§lThe draconic force spreads to every dimension, bringing the world with strong opponents and ways to eliminate them.
§4§o§n§lDifficulty comes to a whole new level
§a§lNew ores can be found across every dimension
§a§lMobs now wear stronger armors and hold stronger weapons
§a§lYou can now explore the outer islands of the End.
§a§lNew treasures can be found in dungeon loot
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.fusion_: §5§o§nYou have obtained a new type of material which you believe to have very strong potential.
§6§o§nYou have obtained the Wyvern Core. You can feel the power even by just holding it.
§a§lYou can now challenge Barako, the Sun Chief
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.awakene: §5§o§nThe Wyvern Core has awakened under excessive energy and activated its full power.
§a§lYou can now mine Titanium in the End
§c§lChaos Guardian is ready to be challenged
§c§lBedrock can be mined with a proper tool
§c§lCreative flight can be enabled with proper gear
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.chaotic: §2§o§nThe guardian of Chaos has been defeated and you are pretty much invincible now.
§5§o§nYou are close to the finish line by possessing the Force of Chaos.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.wielder: §d§o§nYou are getting really close to becoming an executor.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.graduat: §6§o§nThe executor has been chosen. What choice will they make?
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.novice_: §5§o§nYou have gained some basic understandings to technology.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.skilled: §5§o§nYou have gained more understandings to technology and can build some complicated machines now.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.master_: §e§o§nYou have goals on tech that is beyond the understandings of normal folks.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.novice_: §5§o§nYou have gained basic knowledge about magic.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.skilled: §5§o§nYou have understood magic further through hard work.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.master_: §d§o§nYou have finally gained a deep understanding of magic through millions of failures.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.descend: §5§o§nYou have defeated Barako, the Sun Chief. A hot metal has spawned in Nether.
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.wand_bl: §a§lYou can now craft and use Tinker's tool: Sceptre
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.shurike: §a§lYou can now craft and use Tinker's tool: Shuriken
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.laser_g: §a§lYou can now craft and use Tinker's tool: Laser Gun
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.tactic_: §5§o§nUnlocked recipe for a lot of Tinker's weapons.
§a§lYou can now craft and use Cleaver
§a§lYou can now craft and use Longsword
§a§lYou can now craft and use Rapier
§a§lYou can now craft and use Katana

greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.super_h: §5§o§nYou asked for challenge, here it is!
greedycraft.message.stagesunlock.energy_: §5§o§nYou have finally learned how to convert between matter and energy.
